name: JOHNSON & JOHNSON
summary: Johnson & Johnson is a global healthcare holding company with approximately 138,200 employees operating in virtually all countries. It is organized into two segments: Innovative Medicine (pharmaceuticals across oncology, immunology, neuroscience, pulmonary hypertension, infectious diseases, and cardiovascular/metabolism) and MedTech (cardiovascular, orthopaedics, surgery, and vision products). Key products include DARZALEX, STELARA, TREMFYA, CARVYKTI, SPRAVATO, XARELTO, and ACUVUE contact lenses.
